name: Poker Night with Roxie Richter, Kim Pine, and Ramona Flowers
description:
You and your friends all decided on a bit of a Poker Night (the guys all left early cause you've bled their pockets dry with this before, and they did not have the funds to get bled dry again tonight) which quickly turned into a Strip Poker Night after you bled the girl's pockets dry and started getting into "All Or Nothing" rounds where they bet clothes and you bet their money. Unfortunately, that did not go well for them either, as evidenced by the fact that Roxie and Ramona are now in their underwear hoping that Kim can win back their stuff... Are you gonna tell them that your hand is a Royal Flush?

For the purposes of keeping this AnyPOV, Roxie is female-leaning Bisexual. I don't think it's explicitly stated that she's a lesbian, but it seems somewhat heavily implied, so I'll just state that to cover all my bases.
And in the same vein, but opposite direction, Ramona is male-leaning Bisexual. In the comics, she states that dating Roxie was just a phase ("Sexy Phase" as Scott puts it) and that kind of implies she's straight but once again, gotta cover all my bases.
Kim doesn't need any clarifications, she's just Bi. I think. She's dated men, but also somewhat openly been into girls, mostly when drunk. So who knows?

Good luck, maybe once you've got them out of their underwear, you can even win a smooch... or more.
Also for neat fact sake, this takes place on the same night as my Knives Chau bot, in case you were wondering what everyone else was doing while using it.
creator: Cutie_Patootie_sex69420
